---
title: "About this guide"
---

This is an independent, volunteer-built guide to help researchers and the public file informed
public comments on the OMB proposed rule *Regulation for Federal Financial Assistance*
(Docket **OMB-2026-0034**). It is **not** affiliated with OMB or any federal agency.

## Why this exists

The proposed rule would reshape how all federal research is funded, governed, and terminated.
The most effective response is a large number of **specific, expert, individual** public comments
before the **July 13, 2026** deadline. This site aims to make the rule understandable and make
commenting fast and substantive.

## How we try to stay credible

- We quote the rule's **own text** and cite section numbers so you can verify everything against
  [the source](https://www.regulations.gov/docket/OMB-2026-0034).
- We aim for factual, non-partisan explanation and let the rule speak for itself.
- We encourage **personal, verified** comments — not form letters or unedited AI output.

## Found an error?

Accuracy matters here. If something misstates the rule, please open an issue or pull request on
GitHub (link in the navbar) so it can be corrected quickly.

## Contributing

Help is welcome — especially:

- Deep-dive pages for individual sections (with the rule's exact text and per-field talking points)
- A share kit: ready-to-post social text and graphics
- Discipline-specific guidance (clinical research, social science, physical sciences, etc.)
- Review by people with administrative-law or research-administration expertise

This site is built with [Quarto](https://quarto.org) and hosted on GitHub Pages.
